matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Therapeutic Sciences is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: The course aims to select a cohort of students with the skills, motivation and ability to excel to create the next generation of scientific and business leaders in the therapeutics and healthcare sector.
